---
title: "Marie Skłodowska-Curie Post-doc Fellowships (H2020-MSCA-COFUND-2020), «ONISILOS»"
sort_year: 2024
year: "2023 – 2024"
status: "Past"
funder: "H2020-MSCA-COFUND-2020"
categories: [Applied Political Communication, Past]
---

**Year:** 2023 – 2024
**Status:** Past
**Funder:** H2020-MSCA-COFUND-2020
**Research Cluster:** Applied Political Communication
